build: Build #22 — 200 OK + OpenAI chat completion JSON strategy

response_body.choices: collapsed in DevTools — could not expand due to click target issue
response_body.note: APF-generated response confirmed by id='chatcmpl-apf-block'. Response body visible in DevTools Preview tab.

ui_result.ui_message: Copilot was interrupted before it could finish this message.
ui_result.explanation: Copilot frontend expects streaming SSE data but received complete JSON. It interprets this as an interrupted stream and shows generic interruption message instead of rendering the APF warning text.

console_errors: Matched leaf route at location '/copilot/c/1260e2f9-...' does not have an element or Component (NavigatorClientEntry.tsx:84)
console_note: No HTTP errors in Console — consistent with 200 OK response. Only React routing warning present.

diagnosis.status_code: 200 OK — BUILD #22 CONFIRMED DEPLOYED AND WORKING
diagnosis.conclusion: Build #22 (200 OK + chat completion JSON) CONFIRMED for Copilot. APF returns 200 OK with OpenAI-format JSON (id=chatcmpl-apf-block). However, Copilot frontend does NOT render the warning text. Instead it shows 'Copilot was interrupted before it could finish this message.' — the frontend expects SSE streaming and treats the non-streaming JSON as an interruption.
diagnosis.comparison_with_build21: Build #21 returned 422 → generic error. Build #22 returns 200 OK + JSON → 'interrupted' message. Neither build successfully displays the APF warning text to the user.
